content: *경이 물품, 희귀 (조율 필요)* --- 이 망토를 착용한 상태에서 [마법](/1def7f5a1e8081d69aa0f579a00ee48b?pvs=25) 행동을 사용하면 망토가 등에서 한 쌍의 날개로 변합니다. 날개는 1시간 동안 지속되며, 마법 행동으로 효과를 조기 종료할 수 있습니다. 날개가 펼쳐진 동안에는 비행 속도 60ft를 얻습니다. 날개가 사라질 때 공중에 있다면 즉시 추락합니다. 날개를 사용한 후에는 1d12시간이 지나야 다시 사용할 수 있습니다. --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/6f297bb0-b61f-47ce-a2eb-eedb2880475e/638657414297537357.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB466X3HW4MDD%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T095305Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJHMEUCIQCt%2BgvsUwRRSRbyZLg7ijICSfDeoPw7S%2FRp1VlGJzqJFAIgYFGh0faKG4P6i384ScCJWp1s7vaoFg%2BTRiDvliXIa5cq%2FwMIcBAAGgw2Mzc0MjMxODM4MDUiDHZj0BlhB%2FBU77pz7ircA5kelJRS%2FflyhavI6W9u1rUtcGym8KMSt9VPStKtIQ9oigYJLCvdMIR%2BsmWizEF54LADQkOrfGmKQ8M8mR90D4P6uqS7ysMeCLd3FXzc5rcsSXBKgBiq7TuTttOA3uuR%2Fqr7oUwpMQrnuZIfKGkepIiBodpjnsv7pZdVo8eFfGa2RNz8k%2F6XkG%2BEaop63cU3sQ7vcy1a9JIteSjjvmybVld3asCEvG%2F176QA2v4bulPe3cJM9w4xTVE%2Bee6kQ3azErE2goALeKqlsnaB5HEiCpGdoyiUEfiDgoNbOTjcnsJacQ98yOMKi83cNXBYIpcRjzkioleDJExf3iIRGEhbYM3e1BMH3BjE2wQ1EGRUcsE5L6JCzsfTa61DCYLAqeo2Y6%2BX99de7YoiR5wuXYxHy78WbGnuyM204497fK0WgxRQ8oZ4fnoQ8199J9QRZ%2BK59NS551fEaKGgmq6NJJvbb1EXlgdoMlNbAdexY6ugKtdmBfRFlR9Z7lY9Y%2FblS2yuJGPY1yTDnZcmqxN9ydcomR3OWlOZuLZG5CA0%2F13Gs23l%2BhnX6y8PaSe1XFk%2FcoChMpR0NaESJfRrNwv2PuXtL6oNFAmE7SfkosTFxJNN8ouNF4R%2FF1NwHvuFk5xjMJ%2Fcw9EGOqUBLfaddJq%2B9UzU19cGfZTTExCTKZDuJK7mRBtVCe7IDnM2JyT3BZ8B5EEYqU%2FV8n7pBuOazLAytDcPSS4f7KE38nwiSF%2B6oVKbN1BZ2gfbVZC92gUeT%2FDDR%2FlNATInxnPhKVC3axLgzjU3D2TLxy7B505GGto48voupRv5IPhqHyheTqx1HpPKMVDALx3sKLdpfacqBzOksCkRqfPKsDIcUiUsUhaR&X-Amz-Signature=bbf2081c834af219880300dcc90608f6ec04a28bc13af50de900628a2584665d&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
